title: cephalaria squamiflora
intro: Cephalaria squamiflora, also known as Scabiosa or Pustulatum, is a flowering plant species in the honeysuckle family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cephalaria squamiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and fight infections, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as the flu and bronchitis. Cephalaria squamiflora can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
